section.title: Bank accounts
section.description: Connect the bank account where your sales are deposited and check its balance without leaving Avoqado.
section.empty: You haven't connected a bank account yet.
section.loadError: Your bank connections could not be loaded.

actions.disconnectDesc: You'll stop seeing this bank's balance in Avoqado. You can reconnect anytime.

step1.title: Choose your bank
step1.description: Select the institution where you receive your deposits.

step2.title: Sign in to your bank
step2.description: Use the credentials you use for your bank's portal. They are sent encrypted and never stored in plain text.

kind.hint: Personal: the account you use to sign in to your bank app. Business: your merchant panel.

code.twoFactorDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator). It expires in under a minute — have it ready.
code.deviceDesc: Enter the code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator) to authorize this device.

selectAccount.title: Choose the account
selectAccount.description: Your bank has more than one business under this login. Choose which one to see in Avoqado.

done.title: Bank connected!
done.description: You can now see your account balance in Integrations.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.

unsupported.title: {{provider}} isn't available yet
unsupported.description: This connection type (signing in with your bank directly, without a username/password) isn't ready yet. You'll be able to connect it from here soon.

transfer.title: Internal transfer
transfer.description: Send money from {{label}} to another account at the same bank.
transfer.destinationNotFound: We couldn't find that account. Check the number.
transfer.destinationError: The account couldn't be verified. Try again.
transfer.irreversibleWarning: This moves real money and can't be undone.
transfer.errorTitle: The transfer could not be sent
transfer.errorHint: It may still have gone through. Check your movements before retrying.

overview.title: Banks
overview.description: Check balances and movements of your connected accounts.

empty.title: Connect your bank
empty.description: Connect your bank account to see balances, movements and transfer without leaving Avoqado.
empty.noProviders: No banks available right now. Contact support to enable your connection.
empty.pendingDescription: You have a connected bank that needs to reconnect or finish validating. Go to Overview to continue.

movements.title: Movements
movements.description: Live statement of your connected accounts.

transfers.title: Internal transfers
transfers.description: Move money between accounts at the same bank.
transfers.personalOnly: Transfers are only available for personal accounts.

error.title: Could not load your banks
error.description: There was a problem fetching your connections. Try again in a moment.

hub.personalOnly: This feature is only available for personal accounts.

beneficiaries.title: Beneficiaries
beneficiaries.description: Save who you pay to reuse them later in SPEI and disbursements.
beneficiaries.notPersistedWarning: Trial feature: this list resets when you reload the page or sign out. It isn't saved permanently yet.
beneficiaries.empty: You haven't saved any beneficiaries yet.
beneficiaries.deleteDesc: You'll stop seeing {{name}} in your address book. You can add them again anytime.

validation.clabeInvalid: That CLABE isn't valid. Check the 18 digits.
validation.clabeDuplicate: You already have a beneficiary saved with that CLABE.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: What you've received, sent, and disbursed in the last 30 days, across all your accounts.
reports.statsError: Some accounts' data couldn't be loaded. The totals above may be incomplete.

trend.title: Trend
trend.description: Illustrative chart with sample data — your real trend will show here soon.
trend.label: Amount

spei.title: External SPEI
spei.description: Send money to a CLABE at any bank.
spei.formDescription: Review every field carefully: the money leaves your account and cannot be undone.
spei.clabeInvalid: That CLABE isn't valid. Check the 18 digits.
spei.multiAccountUnavailable: For now, SPEI transfers are only available for connections with a single account.
spei.banksLoadError: The bank list could not be loaded.
spei.irreversibleWarning: This goes to an external bank, it's real money and CANNOT be undone. Verify the name and CLABE.
spei.errorTitle: The SPEI could not be sent
spei.errorHint: It may still have gone through. Check your movements before retrying.

dispersions.title: Disbursements
dispersions.description: Pay several beneficiaries in a single batch, e.g. payroll or commissions.
dispersions.formDescription: Form preview — batch sending is coming soon.
dispersions.csvHelp: One row per beneficiary: CLABE, name, amount, concept.
dispersions.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Use one under 5 MB.
dispersions.previewNote: This form is a preview. Batch sending will be available soon.
